hero.tagline: Interactive cycling adventures on Twitch — authenticity, community, and ambitious challenges.

teaser.title: And this is just the beginning
teaser.subtitle: After France, Denmark and Malta, a new destination is on the horizon. SubaBike returns in 2026 to push the boundaries of community adventure even further.

adventures.title: Adventures
adventures.subtitle: Three cycling journeys streamed live on Twitch. From the first national epic to the international SubaBike format, each adventure pushes the boundaries of community-driven live content.
adventures.relatedClipsComing: Clips from this adventure will be available soon.
adventures.comingSoonTeaser: Details about this adventure will be revealed soon. Stay tuned!
adventures.comingSoonCta: Follow the Twitch channel to catch the announcement.

2022.title: Sochaux → Nice
2022.subtitle: The first crossing of France by bike
2022.description: First major cycling adventure live on Twitch. 11 days from Sochaux to the Mediterranean, laying the foundation for a series of community journeys.
2022.story: In July 2022, Fawzz_tv took on his first major IRL challenge: cycling across France, from Sochaux to Nice, streaming the entire journey live on Twitch. The gear was minimal, the logistics homemade — but the community's energy was unmatched. Reaching the Mediterranean marked the birth of a new format on the channel.
highlights: First complete live crossing of France by bike
Arrival on the Mediterranean after 1,000 km
Birth of the community adventure format on the channel

2023.title: Lille → Copenhagen
2023.subtitle: From Lille to Amsterdam, then heading to Denmark
2023.description: 13 days from Lille to Copenhagen. Through Amsterdam, then a boat crossing to Denmark and the road to the Danish capital.
2023.story: Building on the first edition's success, the 2023 adventure changed its starting point: heading out from Lille. Through Brussels, Antwerp, then Amsterdam before pointing north. One boat crossing later, Copenhagen was in sight. With 1,000 km covered and 4 countries crossed, this edition proved the long-distance self-sufficient format was viable — and that the community was ready to follow for the long haul.
highlights: Departure from Lille, through Belgium and the Netherlands
Stop in Amsterdam, then heading to the sea

2024.title: Sochaux → Malta
2024.subtitle: The first SubaBike — subs add kilometers
2024.description: The SubaBike format was born: each subscription adds kilometers instead of time. 34 days of international adventure where the community decides the route in real time.
2024.story: The 2024 edition changed everything with the SubaBike format: each subscription adds kilometers to the route. One donor blew up the counter by adding 1,700 km in one go. The result: 34 days of streaming, 5 countries crossed, and an adventure whose script was literally written by the community in real time.
highlights: New SubaBike format: subs extend the route
Detour Sète → Béziers → Narbonne → Sète for the community
French Riviera: Monaco, then Italian Riviera (Savona, Genoa, La Spezia)
Two ferries: Civitavecchia → Palermo, Pozzallo → Malta
Crossing Sicily: Palermo → Trapani → Sciacca → Pozzallo
A donor adds 1,700 km in one go, an absolute record

2026.title: SubaBike 2026
2026.subtitle: The next adventure is in the works…
2026.description: After France, Denmark, and Malta, a new destination is on the horizon. SubaBike returns in 2026 for an even more ambitious adventure — stay tuned for the reveal.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: The story behind the channel
bio: FAWZZ_TV is a French Twitch channel built around authenticity, community, and ambitious challenges. After 8 years of streaming, what started as a competitive FPS channel (Counter-Strike, Valorant) has grown into a space where gaming coexists with original IRL adventures.
The channel's defining trait is its relationship with its community. Rather than just watching, viewers actively shape the content through their decisions, interactions, and support.
The channel doesn't chase viral moments — it creates memorable adventures together, with an emphasis on human encounters, spontaneity, and storytelling.
